title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, May 03 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 03/05/2022
Image reference: 2022-05-03_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-may-03-2022_img1.png
Bulkers : Bulker values have firmed. Capesize (Newcastlemax) Azul Legenda (206,300 DWT, Mar 2008, Imabari) sold to Unknown European for USD 26.00 mil, VV Value USD 28.10 mil - BWTS Fitted. Capesize C H S Harvest (173,600 DWT, Apr 2006, Bohai Shipbuilding Heavy Industry Co) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 17.50 mil, VV Value USD 18.06 mil - BWTS Fitted.
